title: blemeesd.list_sessions
description: Enumerate sessions known to the daemon. `cwd` and `live` are independent, fully-composable filters; omitting a filter means "no filter on that axis". `cwd` set restricts to that working directory; absent walks every project under `~/.claude/projects/` and every cwd under `~/.codex/sessions/`. `live:true` includes only sessions live in the daemon's SessionTable. `live:false` includes only cold (on-disk) sessions, subtracting any session that's currently live. `live` absent merges both. Empty body means "every session, everywhere" — including a full disk walk; clients that just want "what's running now" should pass `live:true`.

cwd.description: Absolute project directory. Scopes both the disk scan and the live overlay; absent means every cwd.

live.description: Tri-state filter. `true` = live sessions only (no disk scan). `false` = cold sessions only (excludes anything currently live). Absent = both, merged.
